---
title: "Moinul's CV"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: darkly
    css: darkly_custom.css
    toc_float: true
    collapsed: false
    number_sections: false
    toc_depth: 3
    self_contained: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

<a href="cv_moinul.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">
Download CV
</a>

<br><br>

<embed 
  src="cv_moinul.pdf" 
  type="application/pdf" 
  width="100%" 
  height="900px">

Updated on: `r Sys.Date()`
